name: Mayura Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Dining, Travel, Online, International, Birthday, and incremental spends above Rs 20,000
Other retail spends up to Rs 20,000
Rent, education, wallet load, and government spends

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter (including 1 guest visit), subject to a minimum spend of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.
international: 4 complimentary international airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to a minimum spend of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.

milestones.label: 7,500 Reward Points on annual spending of Rs 8 Lakh
15,000 Reward Points on annual spending of Rs 15 Lakh

milestoneBenefits: Earn 7,500 Reward Points on annual spending of Rs 8 Lakh
Earn 15,000 Reward Points on annual spending of Rs 15 Lakh
additionalBenefits: Premium metal credit card with peacock design
Welcome benefit of up to 12,000 Reward Points upon fee realization and meeting spend milestones
4 complimentary railway lounge visits per quarter
Complimentary golf privileges (up to 40 rounds/lessons per year)
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket offer up to Rs 500 twice a month via District app
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 300 per statement cycle at HPCL stations
Reward points are valid for 24 months

salaried: Minimum annual income of Rs 25,000,000 (Rs 25 Lakh)
selfEmployed: Minimum annual income of Rs 25,000,000 (Rs 25 Lakh)

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
5X reward points (3.33 points per Rs 100 spent) up to Rs 20,000 per statement cycle.
10X reward points (6.67 points per Rs 100 spent) on incremental spends above Rs 20,000 and birthday spends.
3X reward points (2.0 points per Rs 100 spent) on rent, education, wallet load, and government spends.
1X reward points (0.67 points per Rs 100 spent) on utilities, insurance, railways, and FASTag recharges.
Airport lounge access requires a minimum spend of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.
Buy 1 Get 1 movie ticket offer is subject to a spend threshold of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.
